answer: Admissions are conducted according to the Bhoramdev Vidyapeeth Coaching Program guidelines. Please contact the coaching office for the latest admission schedule.
The coaching centre offers preparation for CGPSC and CG Vyapam competitive examinations.
Comprehensive coaching for CGPSC Preliminary and Main examinations is available.
Coaching is available for various CG Vyapam recruitment examinations.
Library and reading room facilities are available for enrolled students.
The coaching program is supported by BALCO CSR. Please contact the office for detailed eligibility and financial information.
Regular class tests, mock examinations, and performance assessments are conducted throughout the academic session.
Students are expected to maintain regular attendance. Continuous absence without prior approval may affect enrollment.
Experienced faculty members from different subjects conduct the classes. You can also ask me about a specific subject to know the faculty.
Please contact the coaching office for official assistance regarding admissions, schedules, or other queries.
The Bhoramdev Vidyapeeth Coaching Program is located in Kawardha, Chhattisgarh.
The program is a collaborative initiative of Vidya Bhawan Society, BALCO CSR, and Delhi IAS Academy.
